notes:
The game starts up fine, the menus, settings etc all work fine. Once you get into the game though it runs extremely slowly, ie 4-5fps. I tried different versions of Proton with no luck. I tried using WineD3d, disabling D3d11, disabling D3d10 and disabling ESync, all to no avail, the game just runs very slowly. 

So then I tried running the executable in plain Wine and the game runs perfectly! I then tried running it via Lutris using ge-protonified-4.9 and the game runs perfectly, getting a solid 60fps all the way.

So there is something in the Steam client that causes the game to run so slowly and I can't figure out what it is.
title: Portal of Evil: Stolen Runes Collector's Edition

notes: In Set Launch Options add PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command% to avoid low fps.
title: Portal of Evil: Stolen Runes Collector's Edition
